channel.title: CW Contest Radar
channel.description: Upcoming CW contests with exchanges and rules.

item.title: MST — 20 Jul 1300Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 20 Jul 1630Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 40, 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l

item.title: MST — 20 Jul 1900Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 20 Jul 1900Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l

item.title: MST — 21 Jul 0300Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: CWT — 22 Jul 1300Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 22 Jul 1900Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 23 Jul 0300Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 23 Jul 0700Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: SST — 24 Jul 2000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: SST — 27 Jul 0000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: MST — 27 Jul 1300Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 27 Jul 1630Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 40, 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l

item.title: MST — 27 Jul 1900Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 27 Jul 1900Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l

item.title: MST — 28 Jul 0300Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: CWT — 29 Jul 1300Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 29 Jul 1900Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 30 Jul 0300Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 30 Jul 0700Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: SST — 31 Jul 2000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: NAQP — 1 Aug 1800Z
item.description: North American QSO Party, CW. You send: MATEUSZ. W/VE send name + state/province. As DX outside North America you send just your name. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://www.ncjweb.com/naqp-rules/

item.title: SST — 3 Aug 0000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: MST — 3 Aug 1300Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 3 Aug 1630Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 40, 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l

item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: CWT — 5 Aug 1300Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 5 Aug 1900Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: SST — 7 Aug 2000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: WAE CW — 8 Aug 0000Z
item.description: WAE DX Contest, CW. You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. As a European you work DX only, and QTCs (logged traffic) with them are bonus points. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://www.darc.de/der-club/referate/conteste/wae-dx-contest/en/

item.title: SST — 10 Aug 0000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: CW Open — 5 Sep 0000Z
item.description: CW Open. You send: 001 MATEUSZ. Send serial + name. Three separate 4-hour sessions, each scored on its own. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cw-open/

item.title: CW Open — 5 Sep 1200Z
item.description: CW Open. You send: 001 MATEUSZ. Send serial + name. Three separate 4-hour sessions, each scored on its own. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cw-open/

item.title: CW Open — 5 Sep 2000Z
item.description: CW Open. You send: 001 MATEUSZ. Send serial + name. Three separate 4-hour sessions, each scored on its own. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cw-open/

item.title: SST — 7 Sep 0000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 10 Sep 0300Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: CWT — 10 Sep 0700Z
item.description: CWops Mini-CWT Test. You send: MATEUSZ SO. No RST. CWops members send name + member number; you send name + your prefix/country. It runs fast, but ops will slow to your speed if you call slower. Bands: 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: https://cwops.org/cwops-tests/

item.title: SST — 11 Sep 2000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: SST — 14 Sep 0000Z
item.description: K1USN Slow Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ POL. Slow speed (keep it 20 wpm or under). Send name + your state/province/country. As DX you send name + country. Bands: 160, 80, 40, 20, 15, 10m. Rules: http://www.k1usn.com/sst.html

item.title: MST — 14 Sep 1300Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 14 Sep 1630Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 40, 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l

item.title: MST — 14 Sep 1900Z
item.description: ICWC Medium Speed Test. You send: MATEUSZ 001. Send name + serial number, starting at 001 and counting up across the session. Bands: 80, 40, 20m. Rules: https://icwc.uk/mst.html

item.title: MWC — 14 Sep 1900Z
item.description: OK1WC Memorial (MWC). You send: 599 001. Send RST + serial. The multiplier is the last letter of each worked station's suffix. Bands: 80m. Rules: https://memorial-ok1wc.cz/index.php?page=rules2l
